policy_description: This step applies user decisions only into decision application artifacts.
Applied decisions produce materialization inputs but not ready candidates.
Ready materialization input rows still require a later materialization gate.
Blocked inputs remain excluded from ready materialization inputs.
No training is allowed or performed.
No sample index or final dataset is written.
No split assignment or leakage matrix is written.
The next step must be the ready candidate materialization gate.
Feature semantics audit remains required before training.
Leakage/split design remains required before training.
The canonical five masks remain unchanged.
Decision application artifacts are not training inputs.
